ddls:
CREATE TABLE "carriers" (
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each carrier */,
  "carrier_name" TEXT /* Name of the carrier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the carrier */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the carrier */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code for the carrier */,
  "icao_code" TEXT /* ICAO code for the carrier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the carrier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("carrier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the carrier operating the ticket */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Unused ticket number */,
  "record_locator" TEXT /* Unused ticket record locator */,
  "base_fare" TEXT /* Base fare of the ticket */,
  "taxes" TEXT /* Taxes for the ticket */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Status of the ticket (e.g., pending, refunded, cancelled) */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the passenger who purchased the ticket */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was purchased */,
  "flight_date" TEXT /* Date the flight was scheduled */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number for the ticket */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin airport code */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination airport code */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of travel (e.g., economy, business, first) */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number assigned to the ticket */,
  "refund_status" INTEGER /* ID of the refund status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ticket record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ticket record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES ticket_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_carrier_id FOREIGN KEY ("carrier_id") REFERENCES carriers ("carrier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_refund_status FOREIGN KEY ("refund_status") REFERENCES refund_statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refund_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refund request */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket being refunded */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the refund request was made */,
  "refund_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the refund */,
  "refund_status" INTEGER /* ID of the refund status */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the refund request */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the refund request was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the refund request was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refund_requests_refund_status FOREIGN KEY ("refund_status") REFERENCES refund_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refund_requests_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refund_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" INTEGER /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, customer service, finance) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the activity */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "event" TEXT /* Event triggering the notification (e.g., refund approved) */,
  "recipient" TEXT /* Recipient of the notification */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_event FOREIGN KEY ("event") REFERENCES refund_requests ("request_id")
)
